title: Subscription & Billing
description: Manage your subscription, payment methods, and billing history.

active.title: Annual Plan
active.helper: You'll keep full access until your current billing period ends.

trial.title: Free Trial
trial.notice: No payment method on file - you won't be charged until you choose a plan after your trial ends.
trial.helper: Pick a plan before your trial ends to keep Emma's progress.
trial.downgradeNotice: If you don't choose a plan, your account will revert to limited access (2 tests total) at the end of your trial.

cancelled.title: Annual Plan
cancelled.helper: After this date, your account reverts to limited access.
afterItems: No PDF reports or mock exams
cancelled.reactivateHelper: Reactivate now to keep uninterrupted access. Your next billing date will remain 15 January 2026.
cancelled.reactivateLink: Changed your mind? Reactivate before 15 Jan 2026 ->

pastdue.title: Annual Plan
pastdue.errorSummary: We couldn't process your payment of £79.99 on 15 January 2026.
pastdue.warning: Update your payment method to avoid losing access.
pastdue.updateHelper: Updating your card will trigger an immediate retry.
pastdue.retrySchedule: Retry 1: 18 Jan | Retry 2: 23 Jan | Final: 30 Jan
pastdue.cancelNotice: Your subscription will be cancelled if payment fails 3 times.

cancelModal.title: Cancel your subscription?
cancelModal.intro: You'll keep full access until 15 January 2026.
cancelModal.introDetail: Your children's learning progress, reports, scores, and school setup will remain available until then.
cancelModal.downgradeTitle: After 15 January 2026, your account reverts to:
downgradeItems: No mock exams or PDF reports

availablePlans.title: Available Plans
availablePlans.description: Plan changes take effect at your next billing cycle.

plans.helper: You'll keep Annual access until 15 Jan 2026
You'll keep Annual access until 15 Jan 2026
You're on this plan - no action needed

billingHistory.title: Billing History
billingHistory.description: Receipts are automatically emailed after each payment.
